title: Crumbly Zanzibari Chicken Crumble
description: A nostalgic middle-eastern dish featuring chicken drumsticks in a salty and crumbly sauce for a savory breakfast or snack.
instructions: Season chicken drumsticks with salt, ground cumin, turmeric powder, and black pepper.
Grill the chicken on both sides until golden brown and cooked through, about 12-15 minutes total. Let rest for a few minutes before cutting into strips.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and sauté until softened. Stir in tomato paste and cook for another minute.
Add grilled chicken pieces to the pan along with any accumulated juices. Mix well and let it simmer for about 5-7 minutes to meld flavors.
Stir in saffron threads (soak them in warm water first if they are dried).
Serve hot as a snack or with bread.
